name: nashty-pos-backend
description: Backend API for Nashty POS Enhancement

scripts.migrate: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const sql = fs.readFileSync(path.join(__dirname, 'migrations', 'add_favorites_and_settings.sql'), 'utf8'); console.log('Run this SQL in Supabase SQL Editor:\n'); console.log(sql);"
